title: Person
description: Profile of a person relevant to ShruggieTech. Stable identity and role data only; per-interaction prep notes belong in the future CRM, not here.

role.description: Short free-form phrase describing what this person does. Not an enum.

affiliations.description: References to Organization objects. Primary affiliation is the first element by convention (documented, not schema-enforced).

avatar_url.description: HTTPS URL to a profile image.
